expected.notes: CPT application student name mismatches I-20 student name; engine must fire cpt_application_i20_student_name_mismatch. is_nra=yes from f1_student stage with years<6.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine MUST fire rule 'cpt_application_i20_student_name_mismatch'. All of these conditions must be satisfied simultaneously:
  - comparison.cpt_application_i20_student_name mismatch
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
